tasks.emailBody: > Begin forwarded message: > > From: Nick Farkouh <nick@basebuilding.com> > Subject: UPDATE - Fast Track LUC Amendment - YOU ARE ONCE AGAIN NEEDED > Date: May 1, 2026 at 5:01:02 PM MDT > To: "aalexander@cobnks.com" <aalexander@cobnks.com>, Angie Farrar <angiefarrar@me.com>, Cammie Nichols <cammienichols8@gmail.com>, Caroline Farkouh <carolinefarkouh@me.com>, "Charles Price (Charles@varmint.us.com)" <Charles@varmint.us.com>, Chris Meyers <zentelluride@gmail.com>, "dirk@telluriderealestatebrokers.com" <dirk@telluriderealestatebrokers.com>, Emily Masson <emily@telluriderealty.com>, Fran Berg <fberg60@icloud.com>, Harvey Roisman <hbroisman@gmail.com>, Jim Farrar <jimfarrar2001@yahoo.com>, Jim Lucarelli <jim.lucarelli@compass.com>, Lauren Murray <murraypartners@gmail.com>, Lynn Cranford <lcran2709@yahoo.com>, Michael Saftler <msaftler@montrose.net>, "Morgan Smith (morgancsmith99@gmail.com)" <morgancsmith99@gmail.com>, Nancy Landau <nancylandau@hotmail.com>, "Pam Bennett (pam@aldasoro.com)" <pam@aldasoro.com>, Rick Silverman <richardsilverman1@gmail.com>, "Scott Bennett (scott@telluride-home.com)" <scott@telluride-home.com>, Shellie Duplan <director@aldasororanch.com>, "Virginia Lucarelli (virginialucarelli@gmail.com)" <virginialucarelli@gmail.com> > > Hi Everyone, > > I am so sorry I was not more prompt in sending out this email. No excuses…just “stuff”. > > Abbreviating dramatically, at this past Monday’s SSR meeting (4/27), the SSR voted 5 to 2 to recommend to the County Plannin
